modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: SAS license on laptop has expired and needs renewal.

full_description_text: So, my SAS license on my laptop just expired. I was trying to run some analysis, but it wouldn't let me. I need to get it renewed ASAP to keep working. Can someone help with this?
short_description: SAS license on laptop has expired and needs renewal.
description: So, my SAS license on my laptop just expired. I was trying to run some analysis, but it wouldn't let me. I need to get it renewed ASAP to keep working. Can someone help with this?
